title: Solution Consultant (IT/Presales/MNC)
description:
Responsibilities:

  • Develop and provide leading edge services, solutions and offerings which meet customers’ needs based on current and emerging technologies or business trends with company’s products (along with those from third parties where necessary) by understanding customers’ needs in office environment and providing consultative technical expertise on business solutions
  • Demonstrate software solutions and articulate the benefits of solutions, e.g. technical benefits for technical audiences, business benefits for commercially oriented audiences
  • Interface and work with both internal and external parties to deliver solutions i.e. change how companies work and not just selling a product
  • Support business activities and project implementation by providing direct technical assistance including technical support and training when required
  • Lead technical presentations, solution workshops, and proof-of-concepts.
  • Design Solutions Architecture with simple design and complex clustering & high availability architecture with application failover or leveraging customer infrastructure.
  • For career growth, technical involvement along with BDSG for Managed IT Services and Infrastructure (endpoint management, RMM tools, backup, security, cloud migration, networking and etc)
  • Drive continuous improvement and ensure customer satisfaction through post-deployment support and review
  • Any other duties assigned by Management from time to time

Requirements

  • Degree/Diploma in Engineering, Computer Science or IT
  • At least 1 years of relevant working experience
  • Appreciates technology and how technology can help corporate customers overcome challenges at work with technology

HOW TO APPLY:

Interested applicants, please click on “Apply Now”.

We regret only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

Important Note: Trust Recruit Pte Ltd is committed to safeguarding your personal data in accordance with the Personal Data Protection Act (PDPA).

Please read our privacy statement on our corporate website www.trustrecruit.com.sg.

Trust Recruit Pte Ltd

EA License No: 19C9950

EA Personnel: Chen Shih Ying

EA Personnel Reg No: R25126521

postedCompany.description:
Trust Recruit is Singapore’s leading relationship-based human resource and recruitment firm.


With more than 20 years of collective consulting experience, we provide personalized workforce solutions for our corporate clients, ranging from multinational corporations to the public sector, as well as small and medium enterprises.


At Trust Recruit, integrity and reliability permeate every level of our recruitment process.


TRUST is our currency of interactions; be it with our valued clients, talented job-seekers, or our own employees. Through our premium staffing services, we are committed to connecting and developing quality relationships between candidates and companies.
postedCompany.name: TRUST RECRUIT PTE. LTD.
